title: May 13, 2026
sentiment: The best tools become invisible — so native to the work that you can't tell where the tool ends and the task begins.

stories.title: Linux gaming is faster because Windows APIs are becoming Linux kernel features
stories.summary: Platform boundaries are dissolving — Windows APIs being implemented directly in the Linux kernel shows tools growing into their environment until separation becomes meaningless.

stories.title: Show HN: Needle: We Distilled Gemini Tool Calling into a 26M Model
stories.summary: A 26-million parameter model distilled to do one thing well — tool calling — because massive models are overkill for retrieval-and-assembly work. Small, focused, and it disappears into the task.

stories.title: The Emacsification of Software
stories.summary: The author couldn't find a Markdown viewer that fit, so he built one. The best tools are the ones that become so personally native they stop being tools at all.
